news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs

holdings.infoBox: VSTL is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 65.98%, Vistra Corp Swap Jnst-L at 41.45%, Vistra Corp Inc Swap Ms-L at 32.49%, VISTRA CORP COM CS at 27.12%, and Vistra Corp Swap Nomura at 26.88%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long VST ETF (VSTL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in utilities equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Vistra Corp. (VST), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. VSTL was launched on Jul 21, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
